name: Orange Sorbet
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup frozen orange juice concentrate, undiluted
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the sugar and water in a pan. Heat slowly until the sugar has dissolved.
2. Allow the syrup to cool.
3. Add the orange juice concentrate and blend well.
4. Pour the mixture into an ice cream maker and churn according to the manufacturer's directions.
5. Garnish with fresh orange wedges and mint sprigs.
